Some kind of rare and unusual breed... No, it's just a stone that looks like a fish.

Some of our rarest chests have gone mad! Getting this chest to open is going to be a journey.

Take your chest to Evon Gnashblade to learn more about this mini. 

Minis are tiny models of creatures from around the world. They can be collected and activated one at a time to follow you around.
Some pages appear to be missing from this book.
Some people quit fishing because their net income isn't high enough.
Some rich navigator must have lost this overboard.
Someone in the nearby Pact base to the north would like this.
Someone must've gotten a little too excited while listening to this song.
Someone seems to have taken the matching spoon.
Something hidden, the veil obscures, a language unspoken... In the darkness, she was born again.

Something is making Wintersday gifts angry, and we've got a whole pile of them! Is it something inside? Outside? Or is it just wrapped too tightly?

Talk to Collector Terksli to unwrap this seasonal oddity.
